description: baseline
full attention for all layers at seq len 256
disable alternating value embeddings
increase default depth from 6 to 8 with matched aspect-ratio width
reduce default depth from 6 to 5 for a faster smaller model
replace dense FFN with parameter-matched SwiGLU gating
use learned value embeddings in every layer instead of alternating layers
shrink local sliding attention window from 128 to 64 while keeping mixed local/global layers
switch to multi-query attention with a single KV head
replace SwiGLU gate activation with GELU in the parameter-matched FFN
widen local sliding attention window from 128 to 192 while keeping mixed local/global layers
alternate local/global attention layout while keeping 192-token local windows
widen local sliding attention window from 192 to 224 while keeping mixed local/global layers
default to local attention in every non-final layer
widen local sliding attention window from 224 to 240 while keeping mixed local/global layers
tie input and output embeddings by default for the small SMILES vocabulary
move the non-final global attention layer earlier while keeping 224-token local windows
delay the first non-final global attention layer to the penultimate block while keeping 224-token local windows
use configured ReluSquared gated MLP instead of fixed SiLU gate
use 4 wider attention heads (80d) instead of 5x64 heads at similar model width
rebalance to 7 layers while keeping 320 width and 5x64 heads
reduce to 5 layers while keeping 320 width and 224-token mixed attention
expand value-embedding gates to use the full hidden state
widen to 384 hidden size with 6x64 heads while keeping 6 layers and 224-token mixed attention
reduce SwiGLU FFN expansion from 5x to 4x while keeping 320d mixed attention
use multi-query attention with one shared KV head while keeping the 224-token mixed attention layout
RMS-normalize learned value embeddings before gating them into attention values
gate value embeddings from one full attention head instead of a fixed 32 channels
restrict learned value embeddings to local-attention layers and keep global layers content-only
use 8 medium-width attention heads (40d) instead of 5x64 heads at similar model width
add a second mid-stack global attention layer with SSLL mixed attention while keeping 224-token local windows
progressively widen local attention windows across S layers (160/192/224/224) instead of using a fixed 224-token local window
narrow the earliest local attention window to 128 tokens while keeping later local windows at 192 and 224
tighten the second local attention window to 160 tokens while keeping the first at 128 and later locals at 224
hold the third local attention layer at a 192-token window before widening back to 224
hold the later short attention layer at a 192-token window instead of widening it to 224
widen the last non-final local attention window from 224 to 240 while keeping earlier progressive 128/192/192 windows
widen the last non-final local attention window partway to 208 while keeping the earlier progressive 128/192/192 schedule
insert a 176-token second local attention window before widening to 192 and 224
halve the learned value-embedding gate range so auxiliary values inject more conservatively into attention
tighten the earliest local attention window to 96 tokens while keeping later progressive windows at 192/192/224
tighten the earliest local attention window to 64 tokens while keeping later progressive windows at 192/192/224
moderately tighten the earliest local attention window to 80 tokens while keeping later progressive windows at 192/192/224
shrink the learned value-embedding gate summary from 32 channels to 16 for more conservative auxiliary value mixing
relax the earliest local attention window to 112 tokens while keeping later progressive windows at 192/192/224
widen the second local attention window to 208 tokens while keeping the 96-token earliest window and later 192/224 progression
use the configured ReluSquared activation on the gated MLP branch instead of hardcoded SiLU
tighten the learned value-embedding gate range further to 0.75x sigmoid while keeping the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
drop value embeddings from the final global layer while keeping the tighter 0.75x sigmoid auxiliary-value gate
attenuate auxiliary value-embedding gates on global-attention layers while keeping 0.75x gates on local layers
tighten the learned value-embedding gate range further to 0.625x sigmoid while keeping the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
increase the final global layer's value-embedding gate to 0.875x sigmoid while keeping 0.75x gates on earlier layers
widen the parameter-matched SwiGLU FFN expansion from 5x to 6x while keeping the 0.75x value gate and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
shrink the learned value-embedding gate summary from 32 channels to 24 while keeping the 0.75x value gate and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
halve the initial x0 residual skip to 0.05 while keeping the 0.75x value gate and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
RMS-normalize the gated MLP hidden activation before the output projection while keeping the 0.75x value gate and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
RMS-normalize the merged attention output before the output projection while keeping the 0.75x value gate and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
RMS-normalize merged attention values before the attention kernel while keeping the 0.75x value gate and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
RMS-normalize the MLP value branch before SwiGLU gating while keeping the hidden-state normalization before the output projection
increase the initial x0 residual skip to 0.15 while keeping the 0.75x value gate and post-branch RMS norms
switch each block to a parallel residual update so attention and MLP branches read the same normalized state
initialize a depth-decayed x0 residual skip (0.14->0.06) so early layers stay closer to embeddings while later layers rely more on transformed state
scale each normalized attention residual update to 0.875x while keeping post-branch RMS norms, the 0.75x auxiliary-value gate, and the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
apply GELU to the MLP value branch while keeping SiLU gating, post-branch RMS norm, the 0.75x value gate, and the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
RMS-normalize the projected MLP residual update before adding it back while keeping post-branch hidden norms, the 0.75x value gate, and the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
tie input and output embeddings so the improved exp057 stack shares a single token matrix
scale the post-norm MLP residual update to 0.9x while keeping the 0.75x value gate and post-branch RMS norms
RMS-normalize auxiliary value embeddings before gating them into attention while keeping the 0.75x value gate, post-branch RMS norms, and the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
learn per-layer attention and MLP residual gains while keeping the 0.75x value gate, post-branch RMS norms, and the 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
reduce the parameter-matched SwiGLU FFN expansion from 5x to 4x while keeping the exp057 post-branch RMS norms, 0.75x value gate, and 96/192/192/224 local window schedule
shift the first full-attention block earlier with an SSLS layout while keeping the exp057 post-branch RMS norms, 0.75x value gate, and progressive local window schedule
use an SLLS layout to add one more early full-attention block while keeping exp071 post-branch RMS norms, 0.75x value gate, and progressive local window sizing
limit the learned x0 embedding skip to local-attention layers so the SSLS global blocks operate on transformed context instead of re-injected token embeddings
widen the earliest SSLS local-attention window to 128 tokens so early local blocks see more context before the first global block
narrow the earliest SSLS local-attention window to 64 tokens so the first block stays more local before global mixing
restrict learned value embeddings to the global-attention layers in the exp071 SSLS stack
use multi-query attention with one shared KV head in the exp071 SSLS stack while keeping post-branch RMS norms, the 0.75x value gate, and progressive local windows
boost the learned x0 embedding skip on SSLS full-attention layers so global blocks start with slightly stronger direct token access
move the first non-final global attention block earlier with an SLSS layout while keeping exp071 post-branch RMS norms, the 0.75x value gate, and progressive local windows
keep auxiliary value embeddings only on local-attention layers in the exp071 SSLS stack
tighten the middle SSLS local-attention schedule to 96/160/192/224 so the second short block stays more local before late global mixing
apply ReluSquared to the gated MLP value branch in the exp071 SSLS stack while keeping post-branch RMS norms, the 0.75x value gate, and progressive local windows
halve x0 skip init on full-attention layers in the exp071 SSLS stack so global blocks start with less direct raw embedding reinjection
rebalance the exp071 SSLS stack to 7 narrower 280d layers with 5x56 heads so depth increases at similar compute while keeping post-branch RMS norms and the 0.75x value gate
rebalance the exp071 SSLS stack to 336d with 6x56 heads so the model gets slightly more width and finer attention partitioning at similar depth
share the auxiliary value embedding table across layers in the exp071-style SSLS stack while keeping per-layer value gates
use the full hidden state to gate auxiliary value embeddings in the exp071 SSLS stack while keeping the 0.75x gate range and post-branch RMS norms
keep the last SSLS local-attention block at a 192-token window so the model delays widening until the final global layer
widen the second early SSLS local-attention window to 224 tokens so the block before the first global layer sees fuller context
stop RMS-normalizing attention keys after RoPE in the exp071 SSLS stack so local/global attention keeps key magnitude information
widen the first post-global local-attention window to 224 tokens in the exp071 SSLS stack so context expansion happens sooner after early full attention
add learned per-head query temperatures after QK RMS normalization in the exp071 SSLS stack
replace the second post-global local block with a second consecutive full-attention block by switching the exp071-style stack from SSLS to SSLL
replace the SwiGLU gate activation with GELU in the exp071 SSLS stack while keeping post-branch RMS norms, the 0.75x value gate, and progressive local windows
remove post-RoPE query RMS normalization in the exp071 SSLS stack while keeping key normalization, post-branch RMS norms, and the 0.75x value gate

switch the exp071 SSLS stack from 5x64 attention heads to 4x80 heads so each head sees a wider subspace while keeping width, depth, post-branch RMS norms, the 0.75x value gate, and progressive local windows
tighten the local-attention block immediately after a full-attention layer to 160 tokens so the SSLS stack refocuses locally after global mixing before widening again
tighten the second early SSLS local-attention window to 160 tokens so the pre-global local stack stays more focused before the first full-attention layer
tie input and output embeddings in the exp071 SSLS stack to regularize the small SMILES model while reducing unembedding parameters
taper the exp071 SSLS value-embedding gate range with depth from 0.75x to 0.625x so later layers inject auxiliary token values more conservatively
